session_memory.content: Research findings: Event bus is in-process only (Node.js EventEmitter), no WebSocket/SSE. Dashboard uses polling (setInterval). To get real-time updates to dashboard, need IPC bridge, shared state file with file watcher, or external message queue.
session_memory.condensed: Research findings: Event bus is in-process only (Node.js EventEmitter), no WebSocket/SSE. Dashboard uses polling (setInterval). To get real-time updates to dashboard, need IPC bridge, shared state file with file watcher, or external message
